description: meta-dev enforcement: (1) skill-guard v2 — two-tier gate routing skill mutations through meta-dev:skill-creation (hard-deny create/delete/Write/large edits; allow+nudge single small edits), unlocked per session by any meta-dev:* invocation witnessed on PostToolUse; (2) md-format — nudge-only markdown standards check on every .md write, incl. the constitution-size growth-ladder warning.
